final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing detailed exploded-view technical illustration of a Sony A7 camera showing all its components.

Style/medium: needs a technical exploded-diagram aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be exploded-view layout with all parts separated and spread outward from the camera body, clearly readable
Subject: must include the Sony A7 camera fully disassembled into all its individual parts (body shell, sensor, shutter mechanism, lens mount, viewfinder, buttons, dials, battery compartment, memory card slot, ports, grip, circuit boards, mirror assembly, etc.)
Scene/backdrop: clean neutral background to maximize part legibility
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: needs a clear, high-legibility direction — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include the label "Sony A7" on the main body; must include individual part names as annotation labels pointing to each component
Constraints: must preserve all visible parts labeled with their correct technical names in Spanish; all labels must be legible and connected to their respective parts
Avoid:
